User.title: User
User.description: A user of the CampusCart platform.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

profilePic.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short bio of the user.

rating.description: The average rating of the user.

totalRatings.description: The total number of ratings the user has received.

Item.title: Item
Item.description: An item listed for rent, lend, or exchange.

itemId.description: The unique ID of the item.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the item.

description.description: A detailed description of the item.

pricePerDay.description: The rental price per day in ₹.

imageURL.description: The URL of the item's image.

category.description: The category of the item (e.g., Electronics, Books, Bikes).

status.description: The current availability status of the item.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the item was listed.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A chat session between two users about an item.

chatId.description: The unique ID of the chat.

participants.description: The UIDs of the two users in the chat.

itemId.description: The ID of the item the chat is about.

itemImage.description: The image URL of the item.

lastMessage.description: The text of the last message sent.

lastMessageTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the last message.

typing.description: A map of user UIDs to typing status.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat.

messageId.description: The unique ID of the message.

text.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

Deal.title: Deal
Deal.description: A structured deal proposed within a chat.

dealId.description: The unique ID of the deal.

status.description: The current status of the deal.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the deal was proposed.

/items/{itemId}.description: Items listed for rent or exchange.
